delete.summary: Delete a Drive default storage provider binding

200.description: Drive storage provider binding deletion result.

parameters.name: objectKey

schema.description: Drive object key. UTF-8 1-1024 bytes, trimmed relative key; no leading/trailing slash, double slash, NUL, or period-only path segments.

parameters.description: Drive object key path tail. The runtime accepts slash-separated tail paths such as objects/file.bin and URL-encoded keys where / is encoded as %2F. UTF-8 1-1024 bytes, trimmed relative key; no leading/trailing slash, double slash, NUL, or period-only path segments.

get.summary: List buckets visible to a Drive storage provider account

storageRootPrefix.description: Storage binding root prefix. UTF-8 1-512 bytes, trimmed relative prefix; no leading/trailing slash, double slash, NUL, or period-only path segments.
Storage binding root prefix. UTF-8 1-512 bytes, trimmed relative prefix; no leading/trailing slash, double slash, NUL, or period-only path segments.

credentialRef.description: Drive storage credential reference. Supported forms: plain:<accessKeyId>:<secretAccessKey>[:<sessionToken>], env:<accessKeyEnv>:<secretKeyEnv>[:<sessionTokenEnv>], secret:<ref>, kms:<ref>, or vault:<ref>. secret/kms/vault refs are materialized at runtime from SDKWORK_DRIVE_STORAGE_CREDENTIAL__<sanitized_ref>__ACCESS_KEY_ID, __SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, and optional __SESSION_TOKEN environment variables.

strictTls.description: Provider-level TLS policy. HTTPS endpoints default to true, private HTTP endpoints default to false, and true requires an HTTPS endpoint.

destinationBucket.description: S3-compatible bucket name. DNS-compatible 3-63 characters; lowercase letters, digits, dots, and hyphens only; must start and end with a letter or digit; no IPv4-looking names, adjacent dots, dot-hyphen adjacency, or reserved S3 affixes.

data.description: Operation-specific payload typed per response schema.

item.description: Typed domain resource for the operation.

SdkWorkPlatformErrorCode.description: Platform or domain error code per API_SPEC.md §15.3.
